title: The Internet Is No Longer Human
summary: Bots now exceed human web traffic; Google AI Overviews reduce click-through rates; AI agents increasingly act on behalf of users for browsing and commerce. The video argues this represents a fundamental handoff of internet control from humans to machines.
writeup: This video examines the shift in who, or what, uses the internet, arguing that automated traffic now exceeds human traffic on the web. It connects three trends: bots surpassing humans in web activity, Google AI Overviews lowering click-through rates to source sites, and AI agents increasingly handling browsing and commerce on behalf of users. The central claim is that control of the internet is being handed off from humans to machines. The takeaway is a reframing of the web as a space built for and operated by automated systems rather than human visitors.
